title: Mamdani and Trump Are Set to Meet in Washington
author: Dana Rubinstein, Sally Goldenberg, Nicholas Fandos and Tyler Pager
fullText: Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s trip to the White House on Thursday was unannounced. The topics he planned to discuss with President Trump were not immediately clear.
summary: Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s trip to the White House on Thursday was unannounced. The topics he planned to discuss with President Trump were not immediately clear.
